content.fact_text: Production-ready authentication and authorization middleware implementation.

provenance_data.behaviour: Implements asynchronous authentication middleware that validates JWT tokens, checks session existence in Redis, enforces MFA status, and validates RBAC scopes. Includes request correlation ID propagation and structured PII-redacted logging.
interfaces: createAuthMiddleware(redis: Redis, logger: Logger): (options: AuthMiddlewareOptions) => RequestHandler
TokenPayload { sub: string; email: string; roles: string[]; mfa_verified: boolean; exp: number; jti: string; sid: string; }
provenance_data.utility: Provides a robust, production-ready security layer for enforcing authentication, session validation, MFA requirements, and role-based access control in the API interface layer.
